name: axis-bot
description: AI-powered penetration testing assistant integrated with GitHub Copilot Chat

chatParticipants.name: axis
chatParticipants.description: Your AI-powered penetration testing assistant. Ask me to recon, scan, or analyze targets.

commands.name: recon
commands.description: Perform reconnaissance on a target (OSINT, subdomain enum, DNS, WHOIS)

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Run a port or vulnerability scan against a target

commands.name: exploit
commands.description: Analyze and suggest exploits for discovered vulnerabilities

commands.name: report
commands.description: Generate a penetration testing report from session findings

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Explain a CVE, vulnerability, or attack technique in detail

commands.name: payload
commands.description: Generate or analyze a payload for a given vulnerability type

commands.name: checklist
commands.description: Get a penetration testing checklist for a specific target type

commands.name: clear
commands.description: Clear the current session and findings

languageModelTools.name: http_request
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Make an HTTP or HTTPS request to any URL. Returns the response status code, headers, and body. Use this to probe web application endpoints, submit forms, test for vulnerabilities, and observe real server behaviour.

url.description: The full URL to request (http:// or https://)

method.description: HTTP method: GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, HEAD, OPTIONS

headers.description: Optional request headers as key-value pairs

languageModelTools.name: sitemap_read
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Query the project sitemap for previously recorded HTTP requests and responses. Use this to find endpoints, parameters, and responses already discovered during this scan without making new requests. Filter by URL pattern, HTTP method, status code range, or tags.

urlPattern.description: Regex or substring to match against recorded URLs. Omit to return all entries.

method.description: Filter by HTTP method (e.g. GET, POST)

tags.description: Only return entries that have ALL of these tags

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50)

summaryOnly.description: If true, omit response body from results

languageModelTools.name: sitemap_summary
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a high-level text summary of everything discovered in the sitemap so far: unique method+URL combinations, HTTP status codes, and agent-assigned tags. Call this at the start of exploitation to see what recon has already found before making new requests.

languageModelTools.name: sitemap_annotate
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Add notes and tags to a sitemap entry by URL. Use this to mark interesting endpoints, flag parameters for injection testing, or record observations for other agents.

url.description: The URL of the sitemap entry to annotate

pentag.defaultModel.description: Default AI model to use for the Pentester Agent (uses GitHub Copilot models)

pentag.sessionAutoSave.description: Automatically save session findings to workspace

pentag.reportTemplate.description: Default report template to use when generating reports
